dict.source: Use the Oxygen Theme Settings plugin to set hotkeys, adjust features, select fonts, and choose from preset color schemes. Use the settings below for more granular customization.
dict.target: 使用 Oxygen 主题设置插件来设置快捷键、调整功能、选择字体并从预设配色方案中进行选择。使用下方的设置进行更细致的自定义。

dict.source: Defines all background and border colors unless overridden in more granular settings
dict.target: 定义所有背景和边框颜色，除非在更细致的设置中被覆盖

dict.source: Background color for the main window
Background color for left sidebar and menus
dict.target: 左侧边栏和菜单的背景颜色

dict.source: Background color for hovered buttons and currently selected file
dict.target: 悬停按钮和当前选中文件的背景色

dict.source: For buttons, divider lines, and outlined elements
dict.target: 用于按钮、分隔线和轮廓元素

dict.source: Used when hovering over buttons, dividers, and outlined elements
dict.target: 用于悬停按钮、分隔线和轮廓元素时

dict.source: Used when clicking buttons and outlined elements
dict.target: 用于点击按钮和轮廓元素时
用于按钮、复选框、切换开关

dict.source: Used primarily for text on accented buttons
dict.target: 主要用于强调色按钮上的文字

dict.source: Extended palette colors are defaults used for progress bar status, syntax highlighting, colorful headings, and graph nodes
dict.target: 扩展色板颜色默认用于进度条状态、语法高亮、多彩标题和图表节点
接受任何 CSS 字体大小值

dict.source: Blend the color of nested callouts
dict.target: 混合嵌套提示框的颜色

dict.source: Turns off line wrap for code
Color of code when syntax highlighting is not present
Disables word wrapping in table cells, and trims long text
dict.target: 禁用表格单元格内的自动换行，并截断长文本

dict.source: Makes lists inside of table cells inline and comma separated
dict.target: 使表格单元格内的列表变为内联并以逗号分隔

dict.source: Maximum width for Dataview columns, accepts any CSS width value
dict.target: Dataview 列的最大宽度，接受任意 CSS 宽度值
全局使用严格嵌入样式

dict.source: Transclusions appear seamlessly in the flow of text. Can be enabled per file using the embed-strict helper class
dict.target: 内联内容无缝融入文本流。可通过 embed-strict 辅助类在单个文件中启用

dict.source: Hide title of the transcluded file (if strict embed is off)
dict.target: 隐藏被嵌入文件的标题（如果未启用严格嵌入）

dict.source: Transcluded text is underlined. Can be enabled per file using the embed-underline helper class
dict.target: 嵌入文本添加下划线。可通过 embed-underline 辅助类在单个文件中启用

dict.source: For transcluded text, accepts valid CSS units
dict.target: 适用于嵌入文本，支持有效 CSS 单位

dict.source: Changing graph colors requires closing and reopening graph panes or restarting Obsidian
dict.target: 更改图谱颜色需要关闭并重新打开图谱面板或重启 Obsidian

dict.source: Name of the font as it appears on your system
dict.target: 系统中显示的字体名称

dict.source: Adds a border below the heading

dict.target: 暗黑模式下的图片透明度

dict.source: Level of fading for images in dark mode. Hover over images to display at full brightness.
dict.target: 暗黑模式图片淡化程度。悬停图片以显示全亮度。

dict.source: Allow images to blend into the color scheme background color
dict.target: 允许图片融入配色方案背景色

dict.source: Turns off click + hold to zoom images
dict.target: 关闭点击并按住以缩放图片的功能

dict.source: Sets how images get cropped in a grid
dict.target: 设置图片在网格中的裁剪方式

dict.source: Background of images in cells, useful when images are not cropped to fit
dict.target: 单元格内图片的背景，当图片未裁剪适应时很有用
激活状态的缩进指引颜色
未解析链接下划线颜色

dict.source: Adds a background to current line in editor
dict.target: 为编辑器中的当前行添加背景

dict.source: Width of the file margin used for gutter
dict.target: 用于边栏的文件边距宽度

dict.source: Using a low opacity color is recommended to avoid conflicting with highlights
dict.target: 建议使用低透明度颜色，以避免与高亮冲突

dict.source: Adds strikethrough line and greyed text for completed tasks
dict.target: 为已完成任务添加删除线和灰色文字

dict.source: Vertical space between list items in em units
Horizontal space from left in em units

dict.target: 页面周围的边框和阴影

dict.source: Best for working with black text on white pages

dict.target: 浅色模式 PDF 混合

dict.source: Allow PDFs to blend into the color scheme background color
dict.target: 允许 PDF 混合到配色方案背景色
深色模式 PDF 透明度

dict.source: Fade PDF pages in dark mode
dict.target: 深色模式下淡化 PDF 页面
隐藏属性上方的“属性”标题
隐藏属性下方的“添加属性”按钮

dict.source: Hide icons next to property names
dict.target: 隐藏属性名称旁边的图标

dict.source: Width for the name of the property
Maximum width for pinned left sidebar on mobile
dict.target: 移动端固定左侧边栏的最大宽度

dict.source: Maximum width for pinned right sidebar on mobile
dict.target: 移动端固定右侧边栏的最大宽度

dict.source: Display options for ribbon menu. Ribbon must be turned on in Obsidian Appearance settings for these options to work.
dict.target: 功能区显示选项。需要在 Obsidian 外观设置中开启功能区才能使用这些选项。

dict.source: All of the following settings apply to all tables globally. To turn on these features on a per-note basis use helper classes. See documentation.
dict.target: 以下设置适用于所有表格。要在单个笔记中启用这些功能，请使用辅助类。请参阅文档。

dict.source: Determines how wide tables should behave when they become wider than the line width
dict.target: 确定表格在超过行宽时的行为方式

dict.source: Display borders between table rows globally
dict.target: 全局显示表格行之间的边框

dict.source: Display borders between table columns globally
dict.target: 全局显示表格列之间的边框

dict.source: Display borders around all table cells globally
dict.target: 全局显示所有表格单元格的边框

dict.source: Display striped background in alternating table rows globally
dict.target: 全局为交替的表格行显示斑马纹背景

dict.source: Display striped background in alternating table columns globally
dict.target: 全局为交替的表格列显示斑马纹背景

dict.source: Use fixed width numbers in tables globally
dict.target: 全局在表格中使用固定宽度的数字

dict.source: Display row numbers in tables globally
dict.target: 全局在表格中显示行号

dict.source: Turn off line wrapping in table cells globally
dict.target: 全局关闭表格单元格内的换行

dict.source: Background color for hovered tables rows
dict.target: 鼠标悬停表格行的背景颜色

dict.source: Width of a stacked tab in pixels
dict.target: 堆叠标签页的宽度（像素）

dict.source: Width of the spine in pixels
Tags will render as normal text, overrides settings below
dict.target: 标签将渲染为普通文本，覆盖下方设置

dict.source: Primary text color used by default across all elements
dict.target: 默认用于所有元素的主要文本颜色

dict.source: Secondary text such as sidebar note titles and table headings
dict.target: 次要文本，如侧边栏笔记标题和表格标题

dict.source: tertiary text such as input placeholders, empty checkboxes, and disabled statuses
dict.target: 第三级文本，如输入框占位符、空复选框和禁用状态
Markdown 格式语法文本颜色

dict.source: Space between paragraphs in reading mode (Obsidian 1.3.7+)
dict.target: 阅读模式下段落之间的间距 (Obsidian 1.3.7+)

dict.source: Space between paragraphs and headings in reading mode (Obsidian 1.3.7+)
dict.target: 阅读模式下段落与标题之间的间距 (Obsidian 1.3.7+)

dict.source: Tab title bar must be turned on in Appearance settings
dict.target: 标签页标题栏必须在外观设置中开启

dict.source: Visibility of the tab title text
dict.target: 标签页标题文本可见性
标签页标题文本颜色（激活）
标签页标题文本颜色（未激活）

dict.source: Inline titles must be turned on in Appearance settings
dict.target: 内联标题必须在外观设置中开启
内联标题文字颜色（激活状态）

dict.source: Hide title in the custom title bar
dict.target: 在自定义标题栏中隐藏标题

dict.source: Default fills the available width, accepts valid CSS units
dict.target: 默认填充可用宽度，接受有效的 CSS 单位

dict.source: WARNING — This may be confusing because the characters still exist they are just hidden.
dict.target: 警告 — 这可能会令人困惑，因为字符仍然存在，只是被隐藏了。

dict.source: Press and hold setting names to see their description.
dict.target: 按住设置名称查看描述

dict.source: The cursor style for UI elements
Font size in px of smaller text
Font size in px of smallest text
Turns off toolbar in editor on mobile
dict.target: 在移动端编辑器中关闭工具栏
